subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath sent forth the Messengers and revealed the Book. Verily, there is none other God but He, the Mighty, the Bestower [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی ارسل الرسل و انزل الکتاب انه لا اله الا هو العزیز الوهاب قد
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
